                      +------+
                  +-->|  T1  +-+
                  |   +------+ |
                  |            |
+----------+      |   +------+ |    +--------+
|  Source  +------+-->|  T2  +-+--->|  Sink  |
+----------+      |   +------+ |    +--------+
                  |            |
                  |   +------+ |
                  +-->|  T3  +-+
                      +------+
